title: Poisoned Food
description: This mod adds a poisoned food. You can find poisoned food at chests
body:
This mod adds a poisoned food, can be lootable at the chests (currently not supported), and when you eat this food, you can be poisoned

QNA
==
Q: Can i'm use your mod for my modpacks?
A: Yes, but you need to credit me

Q: Will be a new villager trades?
A: No, because this food will be useless, if you no have addon to this mod called Poisoned Food for Item Snatcher

Q: When new update of this mod?
A: Sorry, but i'm don't know when i'm release a update
